bird.name: Marcapata spinetail
bird.summary: The Marcapata spinetail (Cranioleuca marcapatae) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It i…

relations.subject: Marcapata spinetail
relations.evidence: It inhabits the understory of humid evergreen montane forest, where it favors areas with thickets of Chusquea bamboo
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Marcapata spinetail
relations.evidence: "The only potential threat known to the Marcapata Spinetail is habitat loss, as the species is feared to be susceptible to forest fragmentation and edge effects
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
